pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Change the MapStruct version, likely to resolve compatibility issues or specific feature requirements.
Define a property for the Spring Batch version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Define a property for the Apache POI version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Reorder the spring-boot-starter-web and spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependencies, which is a cosmetic change.
Move the spring-boot-starter-test dependency to a different location in the list, which is a cosmetic change.
Add the Spring Security starter to enable security features in the application.
Add the JJWT API dependency for handling JSON Web Tokens.
Add the JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add the JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization of JWTs.
Add the Spring Security test dependency to support testing secured endpoints.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility methods.
Add the Spring Boot validation starter for bean validation support.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency for interactive API documentation.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI API dependency for API documentation generation.
Add the Spring Boot Batch starter to enable batch processing capabilities.
Add Spring Batch Excel extension for reading/writing Excel files in batch jobs.
Add Spring Batch Core dependency explicitly, likely for specific version control.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency, likely for testing or development.
Add Apache POI core dependency for working with Microsoft Office formats.
Add Apache POI OOXML dependency for working with newer Microsoft Office formats.
Add Hibernate JPA Model Generator for metamodel generation in dependency management.
Add JAXB Runtime dependency in dependency management, likely for XML binding support.
Replace the maven-compiler-plugin configuration with spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration, moving Lombok exclusion logic.
Downgrade the Checkstyle plugin version, possibly due to compatibility issues or preference.
Remove the duplicate spring-boot-maven-plugin block that was previously configured separately.
Adjust XML formatting and remove unnecessary empty tags like <url/>.
